description: This is a position where white can try an abusive invasion, from the last Tsumego book by Motoki Noguchi (in french). In the book black stones are shifted to the left, and white die in gote. Here he can die in sente ^^
sgf:
(;TR[dp]AW[cn]AB[cp]AB[ep]AB[gq]AW[ck]AB[jq]C[White just played at A. Please play a few moves as indicated.FORCE]AW[dq]LB[dq:A]AP[goproblems];B[dp];W[fr]TR[gr]C[FORCE];B[gr];W[fq]TR[fp]C[FORCE];B[fp];W[cq]C[Now kill all marked stones unconditionally. Let me know if you find something wrong.]MA[cq]MA[dq]MA[fq]MA[fr]
